title: El Hijo de L.A. Park

infobox.value: November 20, 1988 (1988-11-20) (age 37)[[2]](#cite_note-Zoalco-2)  [Monclova](/wiki/Monclova "Monclova"), [Coahuila](/wiki/Coahuila "Coahuila"), [Mexico](/wiki/Mexico "Mexico")[[1]](#cite_note-Ovaciones21525-1)
**El Hijo de L.A. Park**[[1]](#cite_note-Ovaciones21525-1) Black Spirit
1.85 m (6 ft 1 in)[[2]](#cite_note-Zoalco-2)
Monclova, Coahuila, Mexico[[2]](#cite_note-Zoalco-2)

[Pierko El Boricua](/wiki/Rafael_Reyes_(wrestler) "Rafael Reyes (wrestler)")[[2]](#cite_note-Zoalco-2) [Skayde](/wiki/Skayde "Skayde")[[2]](#cite_note-Zoalco-2) [Tony Salazar](/wiki/Tony_Salazar "Tony Salazar")[[2]](#cite_note-Zoalco-2) [L.A. Park](/wiki/Adolfo_Tapia "Adolfo Tapia")
July 9, 2008[[1]](#cite_note-Ovaciones21525-1)
Loser (wager) | Location | Event | Date | Notes
El Imagen (mask) | Guadalupe, Nuevo León | Live event | December 26, 2010 | [[Note 1]](#cite_note-16)[[16]](#cite_note-ApuestaImagen-17)

(born November 20, 1988) is a Mexican *[Luchador](/wiki/Lucha_libre "Lucha libre")* *[enmascarado](/wiki/Wrestling_mask "Wrestling mask")*, or masked [professional wrestler](/wiki/Professional_wrestling "Professional wrestling"). better known for his time in [MLW](/wiki/Major_League_Wrestling "Major League Wrestling") where he is a former one-time [MLW World Tag Team Champion](/wiki/MLW_World_Tag_Team_Championship "MLW World Tag Team Championship") with his father [L.A Park](/wiki/L._A._Park "L. A. Park"). He currently wrestles in Mexico in the [independent Circuit](/wiki/Independent_circuit "Independent circuit") and appearances for [Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide](/wiki/Lucha_Libre_AAA_Worldwide "Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide") he is one half of the [AULL Tag Team Champions](/w/index.php?title=AULL_Tag_Team_Championship&action=edit&redlink=1 "AULL Tag Team Championship (page does not exist)")[[4]](#cite_note-4) with his brother [L.A Park Jr](/wiki/L._A._Park_Jr. "L. A. Park Jr.") in their first reign. Originally he wrestled under the name "Black Spirit", keeping the family relation to L.A. Park secret. He has been using the El Hijo de L.A. Park name since 2011. His real name is not a matter of public record, as is often the case with masked wrestlers in Mexico, where their private lives are kept a secret from the wrestling fans.[[5]](#cite_note-Mondo-5)

on 12 August 2008 in a tag team match with [Super Nova](/wiki/Super_Nova_(wrestler) "Super Nova (wrestler)") and Turbo on the [Los Perros De Mal](/wiki/Los_Perros_del_Mal_(promotion) "Los Perros del Mal (promotion)") debut show going up against [X-Fly](/wiki/X-Fly "X-Fly"), [Cerebo Negro](/wiki/Cerebro_Negro "Cerebro Negro") and [Black thunder](/w/index.php?title=Black_thunder_(wrestler)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Black thunder (wrestler) (page does not exist)") in a winning effort.[[6]](#cite_note-6) On 27 February 2009, Black Spirit would team up with Turbo once again to beat Black Thunder and Vampiro Metalico which they won that match. On 13 December 2009 Black Spirit teamed up [L.A Park](/wiki/L._A._Park "L. A. Park") and [Super Parka](/wiki/Super_Parka "Super Parka") to defeated [Damian 666](/wiki/Dami%C3%A1n_666 "Damián 666"), [Perro Aguayo Jr](/wiki/Perro_Aguayo_Jr. "Perro Aguayo Jr."), and [X-Fly](/wiki/X-Fly "X-Fly").[[7]](#cite_note-7)
+ AULL Tag Team Championship (1 time)- with [L.A.Park Jr.](/wiki/L._A._Park_Jr. "L. A. Park Jr.")
+ G21 Tag Team Championship (1 time) – with [L.A. Park](/wiki/L.A._Park "L.A. Park")

+ Kaoz Trios Championship (1 time) – with [La Bestia del Ring](/wiki/La_Bestia_del_Ring "La Bestia del Ring") and [L.A. Park Jr.](/wiki/L.A._Park_Jr. "L.A. Park Jr.")[[11]](#cite_note-KaozTeledario-11)[[12]](#cite_note-KaozFactor4-12)
+ Lucha Libre V.I.P Junior Championship (1 time)

+ [MLW World Tag Team Championship](/wiki/MLW_World_Tag_Team_Championship "MLW World Tag Team Championship") ([1 time](/wiki/MLW_World_Tag_Team_Championship#Reigns "MLW World Tag Team Championship")) – with L.A. Park
+ OILL Juniors Tag Team Tournament (2010) – with [El Hijo de Dr. Wagner Jr.](/wiki/El_Hijo_de_Dr._Wagner_Jr. "El Hijo de Dr. Wagner Jr.")[[13]](#cite_note-13)
+ UWE Tag Team Championship (1 time) – with [El Hijo del Pirata Morgan](/wiki/El_Hijo_del_Pirata_Morgan "El Hijo del Pirata Morgan")[[15]](#cite_note-15)

Three–way match, which also included El Enfermero. The three lost a *[Relevos Suicidas](/wiki/Professional_wrestling_tag_team_match_types#Parejas_Suicidas "Professional wrestling tag team match types")* match against Fuego Latino, Silver Star and [Volador Jr.](/wiki/Volador_Jr. "Volador Jr.") and were forced to wrestle each other.
["Hijo de LA Park"](https://mlw.com/hijo-de-la-park/). 31 July 2018.
["Cagematch.net el hijo de l.a park titles"](https://www.cagematch.net/?id=2&nr=9334&page=11).

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Mexican professional wrestler

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | This article needs to be **updated**. The reason given is: **his career since 2011**. Please help update this article to reflect recent events or newly available information. *(January 2019)* |

El Hijo de L.A. Park

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Hijo de L.A. Park during a Pro Wrestling Revolution event | |
| Personal information | |
| Born | November 20, 1988 (1988-11-20) (age 37)[[2]](#cite_note-Zoalco-2)  [Monclova](/wiki/Monclova "Monclova"), [Coahuila](/wiki/Coahuila "Coahuila"), [Mexico](/wiki/Mexico "Mexico")[[1]](#cite_note-Ovaciones21525-1) |

| Billed from | Monclova, Coahuila, Mexico[[2]](#cite_note-Zoalco-2) |

Park](/wiki/Adolfo_Tapia "Adolfo Tapia") |

|  | |

**El Hijo de L.A. Park** (born November 20, 1988) is a Mexican *[Luchador](/wiki/Lucha_libre "Lucha libre")* *[enmascarado](/wiki/Wrestling_mask "Wrestling mask")*, or masked [professional wrestler](/wiki/Professional_wrestling "Professional wrestling"). better known for his time in [MLW](/wiki/Major_League_Wrestling "Major League Wrestling") where he is a former one-time [MLW World Tag Team Champion](/wiki/MLW_World_Tag_Team_Championship "MLW World Tag Team Championship") with his father [L.A Park](/wiki/L._A._Park "L. A. Park"). He currently wrestles in Mexico in the [independent Circuit](/wiki/Independent_circuit "Independent circuit") and appearances for [Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide](/wiki/Lucha_Libre_AAA_Worldwide "Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide") he is one half of the [AULL Tag Team Champions](/w/index.php?title=AULL_Tag_Team_Championship&action=edit&redlink=1 "AULL Tag Team Championship (page does not exist)")[[4]](#cite_note-4) with his brother [L.A Park Jr](/wiki/L._A._Park_Jr. "L. A. Park Jr.") in their first reign. Originally he wrestled under the name "Black Spirit", keeping the family relation to L.A. Park secret. He has been using the El Hijo de L.A. Park name since 2011. His real name is not a matter of public record, as is often the case with masked wrestlers in Mexico, where their private lives are kept a secret from the wrestling fans.[[5]](#cite_note-Mondo-5)

## Professional wrestling career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=El_Hijo_de_L.A._Park&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Professional wrestling career")]

### Independent circuit (2008–present)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=El_Hijo_de_L.A._Park&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Independent circuit (2008–present)")]

El Hijo de L.A Park started his professional wrestling career under the ring name **Black Spirit** on 12 August 2008 in a tag team match with [Super Nova](/wiki/Super_Nova_(wrestler) "Super Nova (wrestler)") and Turbo on the [Los Perros De Mal](/wiki/Los_Perros_del_Mal_(promotion) "Los Perros del Mal (promotion)") debut show going up against [X-Fly](/wiki/X-Fly "X-Fly"), [Cerebo Negro](/wiki/Cerebro_Negro "Cerebro Negro") and [Black thunder](/w/index.php?title=Black_thunder_(wrestler)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Black thunder (wrestler) (page does not exist)") in a winning effort.[[6]](#cite_note-6) On 27 February 2009, Black Spirit would team up with Turbo once again to beat Black Thunder and Vampiro Metalico which they won that match. On 13 December 2009 Black Spirit teamed up [L.A Park](/wiki/L._A._Park "L. A. Park") and [Super Parka](/wiki/Super_Parka "Super Parka") to defeated [Damian 666](/wiki/Dami%C3%A1n_666 "Damián 666"), [Perro Aguayo Jr](/wiki/Perro_Aguayo_Jr. "Perro Aguayo Jr."), and [X-Fly](/wiki/X-Fly "X-Fly").[[7]](#cite_note-7)

### CMLL appearances (2018–2019)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=El_Hijo_de_L.A._Park&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: CMLL appearances (2018–2019)")]

In 2018, El Hijo de L.A Park made his professional wrestling debut in [CMLL](/wiki/Consejo_Mundial_de_Lucha_Libre "Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre"), the oldest professional wrestling promotion in Mexico.[[8]](#cite_note-8) On 14 September 2018, El Hijo de L.A Park teamed up with his father, L.A Park, and [Caristico](/wiki/M%C3%ADstico "Místico") to take on [Diamante Azul](/wiki/DMT_Azul "DMT Azul"), [King Phoenix](/wiki/F%C3%A9nix_(wrestler) "Fénix (wrestler)"), and [Penta El Zero M](/wiki/Pentag%C3%B3n_Jr. "Pentagón Jr.") at [CMLL 85 Anniversario](/w/index.php?title=CMLL_85_Anniversario&action=edit&redlink=1 "CMLL 85 Anniversario (page does not exist)").[[9]](#cite_note-9) On 19 July 2019, El Hijo de L.A Park teamed with his father again as well as with his brother, L.A. Park Jr, to take on [La Bestia del Ring](/wiki/La_Bestia_del_Ring "La Bestia del Ring"), [Mistico](/wiki/M%C3%ADstico "Místico") & [Rush](/wiki/Rush_(wrestler) "Rush (wrestler)").[[10]](#cite_note-10)

## Championships and accomplishments

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=El_Hijo_de_L.A._Park&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Championships and accomplishments")]

* **Alianza Universal de Lucha Libre**
  + AULL Tag Team Championship (1 time)- with [L.A.Park Jr.](/wiki/L._A._Park_Jr. "L. A. Park Jr.")
* **Generacion XXI**
  + G21 Tag Team Championship (1 time) – with [L.A. Park](/wiki/L.A._Park "L.A. Park")
* **Kaoz Lucha Libre**
  + Kaoz Trios Championship (1 time) – with [La Bestia del Ring](/wiki/La_Bestia_del_Ring "La Bestia del Ring") and [L.A. Park Jr.](/wiki/L.A._Park_Jr. "L.A. Park Jr.")[[11]](#cite_note-KaozTeledario-11)[[12]](#cite_note-KaozFactor4-12)
* **Lucha Libre V.I.P**
  + Lucha Libre V.I.P Junior Championship (1 time)
* **[Major League Wrestling](/wiki/Major_League_Wrestling "Major League Wrestling")**
  + [MLW World Tag Team Championship](/wiki/MLW_World_Tag_Team_Championship "MLW World Tag Team Championship") ([1 time](/wiki/MLW_World_Tag_Team_Championship#Reigns "MLW World Tag Team Championship")) – with L.A. Park
* **Organización Independiente de Lucha Libre**
  + OILL Juniors Tag Team Tournament (2010) – with [El Hijo de Dr. Wagner Jr.](/wiki/El_Hijo_de_Dr._Wagner_Jr. "El Hijo de Dr. Wagner Jr.")[[13]](#cite_note-13)
* ***[Pro Wrestling Illustrated](/wiki/Pro_Wrestling_Illustrated "Pro Wrestling Illustrated")***
  + Ranked No. 149 of the top 500 singles wrestlers in the *[PWI 500](/wiki/Pro_Wrestling_Illustrated#PWI_500 "Pro Wrestling Illustrated")* in 2020[[14]](#cite_note-14)
* **Universal Wrestling Entertainment**
  + UWE Tag Team Championship (1 time) – with [El Hijo del Pirata Morgan](/wiki/El_Hijo_del_Pirata_Morgan "El Hijo del Pirata Morgan")[[15]](#cite_note-15)

## *Luchas de Apuesta* record

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=El_Hijo_de_L.A._Park&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Luchas de Apuesta record")]

See also: [Luchas de Apuestas](/wiki/Lucha_libre#Luchas_de_Apuestas "Lucha libre")

## Notes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=El_Hijo_de_L.A._Park&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Notes")]

1. **[^](#cite_ref-16)** Three–way match, which also included El Enfermero. The three lost a *[Relevos Suicidas](/wiki/Professional_wrestling_tag_team_match_types#Parejas_Suicidas "Professional wrestling tag team match types")* match against Fuego Latino, Silver Star and [Volador Jr.](/wiki/Volador_Jr. "Volador Jr.") and were forced to wrestle each other.
